mapper.sql: id, member_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, country_code, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, detail_address, postal_code, label, is_default, version, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE pinova.member_shipping_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_mobile = #{receiverMobile}, country_code = #{countryCode}, province_code = #{provinceCode}, province_name = #{provinceName}, city_code = #{cityCode}, city_name = #{cityName}, district_code = #{districtCode}, district_name = #{districtName}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, label = #{label}, is_default = #{defaultAddress}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = false

UPDATE pinova.member_shipping_address SET is_default = true, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{operatorId} WHERE id = ( SELECT id FROM pinova.member_shipping_address WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted = false ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 )
